_comment: Starpath Protocol — Gemini 图片生成专用 tokens，供 Image Subagent 直接引用

color_palette._comment: 在 Gemini prompt 中引用色值和对应描述语（英文）

parchment.prompt_description: warm parchment background (#F5F1EB) with subtle handmade paper texture

obsidian.prompt_description: deep obsidian black (#1A1A1A) as primary contrast element

warm_dark.prompt_description: warm dark background (#2A2520) with subtle aged paper texture

aligned_cool.prompt_description: stars in low-saturation cool blue (#8AACB8) with soft halos

risk_red.prompt_description: restrained red (#8B3A3A) used only for risk markers, never for judgment

warm_gray.prompt_description: low-saturation cool gray-green (#8A9A8A) for aligned state

style_modules._comment: 4 个 prompt 模块，按 [SCENE] + [STYLE] + [TECHNICAL] + [NEGATIVE] 组装

STYLE_parchment.usage: 默认主题，适用于大多数干预场景
STYLE_parchment.prompt: Style: minimalist composition inspired by Japanese ma (negative space) and Scandinavian restraint. High contrast. Warm parchment background (#F5F1EB) with subtle handmade paper texture. Deep obsidian black (#1A1A1A) as primary contrast element. Large generous white space comprising 40-60% of composition. Linear divisions, no containers or shadows. Quiet confidence, never decorative.

STYLE_warm_dark.usage: Map 页专用，深沉内省的隐喻场景
STYLE_warm_dark.prompt: Style: hand-drawn celestial cartography on warm dark background (#2A2520) with subtle aged paper texture. Stars in low-saturation cool blue (#8AACB8) with soft halos. Connecting lines as organic Bézier curves, not rigid geometry. Eastern ink painting meets star atlas aesthetic. Generous dark negative space (60%+).

TECHNICAL.prompt: Medium format film aesthetic with subtle organic grain. Natural side lighting, soft and diffused. Non-photorealistic rendering.

NEGATIVE.prompt: Avoid: colorful, vibrant, busy, excessive gradients, motivational graphics, medical blue, bright green/yellow/orange, rounded containers, drop shadows, glossy effects, gamification elements (badges, stars, explosions), fitness influencer photography, stock photo people, cartoon or emoji style, high saturation, 3D effects, watermarks, realistic human faces.

future_self.name: 未来自我可视化
trigger_conditions: 用户描述了理想状态但表达抽象或遥远
新 Chapter 启动时建立身份愿景
variables: scene_description: 具体的自我领导时刻场景描述
sensory_details: 细节感官描述（灯光、物品、纹理）
identity_text: 嵌入图片的身份宣言（一句话）
time_of_day: 时段描述（early morning / evening / etc.）
emotional_tone: 情感基调（quiet clarity / grounded ease / etc.）

text_overlay.style: hand-lettered, obsidian black, small and dignified

future_self.mood: grounded, clear, 'this is who I'm becoming'

scene_rehearsal.name: 场景预演
trigger_conditions: 用户提到即将面对的挑战性事件
Coach 检测到历史上该类场景常导致行为波动
variables: setting_description: 挑战性社交环境的场景描述
challenge_context: 挑战背景（如 social and energetic, full of temptation）
aligned_choice_detail: 对齐选择的具体细节（如用户手边的水杯、清晰的个人空间）
anchor_text: 锚定文字（一句话，底部）
scene_rehearsal.figure_style: abstract silhouette or shadow, never a realistic person
scene_rehearsal.mood: composed, intentional, 'I lead myself even here'

metaphor_mirror.name: 隐喻图像化
trigger_conditions: 用户使用隐喻语言描述行为体验
Coach 在模式分析中构建了有力的隐喻解读
metaphor_mirror.style_selection_rule: light metaphors → parchment, heavy/deep metaphors → warm_dark
variables: metaphor_scene: 内心体验的抽象自然/物理景观描述
transformation_element: 转化元素（如石头、桥梁、光线）
emotional_undercurrent: 情感暗流（recognition without alarm / honest complexity）
insight_text: 洞察文字（一句话，观察而非建议）
metaphor_mirror.rendering_style: dreamlike but not surreal, loose organic brushwork (sumi-e), large untouched background (50%+)
metaphor_mirror.mood: reflective, honest, 'this is what it feels like — and that's information'

reframe_contrast.name: 认知重构
trigger_conditions: 用户陷入固定视角看待行为偏离（自责、放弃心态）
Coach 检测到重复的自我批评模式
variables: situation_description: 同一场景的描述（两个面板共用的基础情境）
old_frame_visual: 左面板——评判视角的视觉描述（紧绷、压缩）
new_frame_visual: 右面板——信息视角的视觉描述（呼吸、开放）
reframe_text: 重构文字（一句话，两面板下方居中）

composition.left_panel: smaller, slightly faded, cooler tighter marks
composition.right_panel: larger, clearer, warmer expansive strokes, one subtle warm accent
composition.divider: thin vertical obsidian line between panels

reframe_contrast.mood: perspective shift, 'the same facts tell different stories'

identity_evolution.name: 身份演化
trigger_conditions: Coach 检测到显著的行为模式正向转变
variables: form_count: 剪影数量（通常 3，代表演化的时间跨度）
evolution_description: 演化过程描述（从模糊到清晰，从不确定到有根基）
continuity_note: 连续性注释（如 the core brushstroke is unchanged）

composition.forms: overlapping silhouettes, left to right, each more defined
composition.connecting_lines: delicate lines suggesting continuity between forms

global_constraints._comment: 所有图片生成的全局约束，无论模板类型
global_constraints.figure_rendering: abstract silhouette, shadow, or environmental detail only

text_overlay_rules.placement: subtle, as if written on the scene

preferred_styles: editorial illustration with selective ink wash

prompt_engineering_notes: 用段落叙述而非关键词列表——Gemini 在段落式描述下效果更好
写入具体色号（#F5F1EB, #2A2520, #8AACB8）锁定调色板
显式要求留白——'generous negative space'、'60%+ white space'
负面 prompt 用 'Avoid: X, Y, Z' 格式，不用 'No X'
将用户原话中的隐喻直接嵌入 prompt，比转述更有效
避免真人面孔——使用剪影、抽象形态、环境细节
文本嵌入要克制——一句话，肯定句或洞察
情绪色温匹配——温暖/安全用羊皮纸底，深沉/内省用暖黑底
